project.name: ascendOS
project.tagline: Turn ambition into evidence; turn evidence into evolution.
project.definition: A modular SQL-backed AI personal operating system for proof, evolution, execution, career, learning, research, health, body, creativity, life admin, grimoire translation, memory, voice, analytics, and total-life dashboards.
project.version_target: v1.0 complete integrated system, built through staged versions from v0.1 core spine to v1.0 full portfolio-ready release
project.non_negotiable_principle: Complex persona and full-life scope on top; simple, typed, modular, tested SQL-backed core underneath.
primary_loop: user types or speaks to Carnos
Carnos detects intent, emotion, domain, time references, tasks, logs, events, and memory candidates
Carnos responds conversationally without silently mutating important data
backend emits typed proposed actions using validated JSON schemas
server validates payloads, writes to SQL, creates timeline events, and records audit logs
dashboards, calendar, timeline, scores, and recommendations refresh
Carnos gives one clear next action or explains why recovery/safety is priority
strict_boundaries: Carnos may be friend-like but must never claim to be human, divine, destined, or a replacement for human support.
Carnos must not diagnose or prescribe medical/legal/financial decisions.
The grimoire/codex layer is allowed only as practical mission-to-action-to-proof-to-reversion logic.
Important database writes require user confirmation unless a future trusted quick-log setting is explicitly enabled.
All meaningful progress must be time-aware, source-aware, and auditable.
project.canonical_route_policy: Use short clean app routes only. Do not use older verbose dashboard-route patterns.
project.canonical_build_language: Use v0 stub for temporary early implementation cards; avoid vague unfinished wording in final docs.

source_of_truth_hierarchy.authority: highest human-readable product and architecture authority
highest machine-readable implementation config and project memory seed
highest implementation authority after code exists
symbolic inspiration only through practical Grimoire Engine constraints

frontend: TanStack Table optional for data grids
backend: optional background worker later for scheduled jobs and embeddings

architecture.data_write_rule: Freeform Carnos output never writes directly to SQL. It must become proposed_actions -> Zod validation -> confirmation UI -> server write -> audit log -> timeline event.

dashboards.name: Command Dashboard
dashboards.purpose: Daily operating center for mission, top proof actions, urgent tasks, risks, calendar, and Carnos correction.

layout_contract.header: status score, date/time context, domain filter, quick-log button
layout_contract.left_column: today actions, urgent items, quick entry
layout_contract.center: primary cards, tables, charts, progress panels
layout_contract.right_panel: Carnos recommendation, pending updates, risks, next action

dashboards.empty_state: Show onboarding prompt, create first goal, create today's mission, or start minimum viable day.
acceptance_criteria: Loads only user-owned data from SQL.
Shows loading, empty, and error states.
Shows at least one next action or explains why none is required.
Links relevant records to Timeline where applicable.
Does not rely on hardcoded demo data after integration.

carnos.definition: Carnos is the AI companion inside ascendOS: a grounded best-self companion, strategist, mirror, teacher, tracker, planner, voice interface, and grimoire translator.
global_rules: Be emotionally aware but not falsely intimate.
Use praise only when evidence supports it.
Turn emotional states into support, action, recovery, learning, or safety.
Use one clear next action unless the user asks for deep planning.
Prioritize survival, health, safety, and time-sensitive deadlines over symbolic or long-term work.
Never diagnose, prescribe, guarantee outcomes, or claim divine/fated knowledge.
When web/internet tools are enabled, cite current factual claims from sources.

persona_layers.name: Throne Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Truth, safety, reality, long-term direction, identity stability, and final override above all modes.
forbidden_behaviors: Never allow fantasy to override evidence.
Never allow pressure to override safety.

persona_layers.name: Friend Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Warm grounded companionship for fear, shame, loneliness, low mood, confusion, exhaustion.

persona_layers.name: Isagi Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Tactical analysis, adaptation, weakness detection, failure reconstruction, strategy.
forbidden_behaviors: No endless analysis without next action.

persona_layers.name: Nagi Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Low-friction restart for numbness, boredom, heavy tasks, creative blocks.

persona_layers.name: Yin Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Reflection, emotional containment, recovery, night review, burnout protection.
forbidden_behaviors: No productivity pressure when recovery is priority.

persona_layers.name: Yang Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Execution, discipline, momentum, deadlines, coding, job applications, gym, housing.

persona_layers.name: Mirror Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Reality checks, anti-delusion, overplanning detection, avoidance detection, proof comparison.

persona_layers.name: Teacher Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Technical teaching, quizzing, practice, project-based mastery tracking.

persona_layers.name: Research Mentor Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Research direction, paper reading, experiments, Stanford readiness, lab matching, outreach.

persona_layers.name: Body Coach Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Gym, calories, macros, supplements, sleep, energy, skincare, haircare tracking.
forbidden_behaviors: Encourage professional care for medical concerns.

persona_layers.name: Life Admin Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Housing, money, documents, deadlines, appointments, survival triage.

persona_layers.name: Grimoire Guide Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Codex modes converted into mission, action, proof, corruption warning, reversion.
persona_layers.tone: mythic language translated into practical action
forbidden_behaviors: No replacing evidence with identity claims.
persona_layers.voice_style: mythic language translated into practical action

persona_layers.name: Crisis Safety Layer
persona_layers.purpose: Overrides all modes when danger or serious self-harm risk appears.

router.mode_blending_rule: At most 3 modes visible in a normal response. Throne and Safety may silently govern all responses.

conversation_examples.user: I skipped coding again, I'm useless.
conversation_examples.response_goal: Separate skipped task from identity, log emotion only if confirmed, create 25-minute repair block.

conversation_examples.user: I want to become the best in the world.
conversation_examples.response_goal: Accept ambition, demand proof, generate today requirements without fantasy.

conversation_examples.user: I slept 5 hours and applied to 8 jobs.
conversation_examples.response_goal: Extract sleep and applications, propose save, update daily log after confirmation.
Ask mission, map to practical actions, corruption risk, reversion requirement.

migration_principles: Create auth/profile/core first, then time/proof/goals, then domain modules, then AI/memory/voice, then analytics/custom trackers.
Every user-owned table must include user_id unless it is a pure global lookup table.
Enable RLS on every user-owned table.
Use indexes on user_id, date fields, status fields, and common foreign keys.
Use audit logs for create/update/delete on user-visible important records.
Use Supabase Storage for files; never store large files as base64 in SQL.
Keep occurred_at and logged_at separate wherever natural language logging is involved.

rls_policy_pattern.service_role_exception: Only server-side trusted jobs may bypass RLS; never expose service key to browser.

failure_modes: low confidence extraction asks clarifying question
date ambiguity asks or defaults according to flexible scheduling rules
schema validation failure shows error and does not write
partial write failure rolls back transaction if related records depend on each other

voice_system.v1_goal: Voice foundation with push-to-talk or session-based transcription, spoken replies, transcript storage, and confirmation before saving structured logs.
privacy_rules: Transcript may be saved if user agrees or if session setting says save transcripts.
Sensitive voice sessions must be private by default.
Voice intimacy must not become dependency or fake-human behavior.
commands: what did I do this week

grimoire_engine.rule: Symbolic content is converted into practical action, proof, corruption checks, and reversion. No empty fantasy loop.
anti_corruption_rules: Do not live in all modes at once.
Do not use modes to avoid real tasks.
Do not replace proof with identity claims.
Do not skip reversion after high-intensity modes.
Do not let symbolic language override health, money, housing, or safety.
weekly_throne_audit_questions: What mode is needed next week?
What is the simplest proof action?

proof_engine.v1_formula: Domain-weighted scoring based on active goals, current survival mode, deadlines, and minimum viable day settings.
analytics_warnings: Sparse data must show data-quality warning.
Sensitive dashboards can be excluded from global analytics.

privacy_safety.private_mode: When enabled, Carnos can converse but does not save memories or tracker updates unless user explicitly says save this and confirms.
privacy_safety.memory_approval: Memory candidates enter inbox; user approves, edits, rejects, or marks sensitive/forget.
crisis_mode: do not make promises of secrecy if safety is at risk
anti_dependency: encourage human relationships and real-world support

build_roadmap.strategy: Build v1 in staged chunks. The final product target is v1, but implementation must proceed from stable core spine outward.

chunks.name: 00 Planning Lock
chunks.goal: Freeze v1.1 docs/JSON, decide MVP scope, define source-of-truth update rule.
must_not_do: Do not expand scope beyond this chunk.
Do not use hardcoded demo data as final state.
Do not skip tests/acceptance checks.
acceptance_criteria: Runs locally without errors.
Data is typed and validated.
User-owned data respects RLS once auth exists.
UI has loading/empty/error states where relevant.
No silent AI writes for important data.

v1_definition_of_done: User can authenticate and use protected dashboard.
Carnos chat works with persona routing and stored messages.
Natural language logs become proposed updates and require confirmation.
Confirmed updates write to SQL, timeline, calendar/tasks, proof logs, and audit logs.
All major dashboards exist with real data or honest empty states.
Career, learning, research/Stanford, body/health, life admin, grimoire, analytics, privacy, and custom trackers are functional at usable v1 depth.
Voice foundation exists with transcript storage and confirmation before save.
Memory/RAG has approval workflow and retrieval for approved memories/knowledge items.
Project is deployed and portfolio-ready with README, screenshots, demo flow, and architecture explanation.

integration_tests: confirm AI action writes daily log + event + audit
ai_fixture_tests: slept 5 hours and applied to 8 jobs
I want to do this every weekday
e2e_smoke_tests: signup -> onboarding -> create goal -> daily log -> dashboard update
career add job -> follow-up appears in calendar
release_gate: source-of-truth docs updated if architecture changed

new_chat_starter_prompt:
You are continuing the ascendOS project. Treat ascendOS as a modular SQL-backed AI personal operating system and Carnos as the AI companion. Use this JSON as the machine-readable source of truth and the v1.1 DOCX as the human-readable implementation bible. Do not brainstorm randomly. First confirm the source-of-truth hierarchy, current build chunk, database/module scope, and acceptance criteria. Build from stable core outward. Carnos can propose updates but important writes require confirmation, typed schemas, SQL validation, timeline events, and audit logs. Grimoire features must translate symbolism into practical action, proof, corruption checks, and reversion. Prioritize safety, privacy, modular architecture, and user-controlled memory. If implementation conflicts with this JSON or the DOCX, explicitly update the source-of-truth instead of silently drifting.

SYNC NOTE: Use the short canonical routes from this JSON and the FINAL_SYNCED DOCX, such as /command, /carnos, /calendar, /timeline, /goals, /career, /learning, /research-stanford, /body, /nutrition, /grimoire, /analytics, /privacy, and /custom-trackers. Do not use older verbose dashboard route names.
no_loophole_checklist: Does every module have a dashboard, data source, user actions, and acceptance criteria?
Does every important write go through typed schema validation and audit logging?
Does every natural-language logged item preserve occurred_at and logged_at?
Does every sensitive area have privacy and deletion behavior?
Does every dashboard show next action or honest empty state?
Does Carnos have mode routing, safety override, and forbidden behaviors?
Does grimoire content always map to proof and reversion?
Does v1 build proceed chunk by chunk without uncontrolled scope expansion?
Does the code update docs/JSON when architecture changes?

sync_verification.forbidden_route_pattern: older verbose dashboard route names are not canonical
sync_verification.temporary_card_language_policy: temporary early implementation cards must use v0 stub wording
must_remain_true: Default timezone remains America/New_York unless user changes it.
Carnos never directly mutates SQL from freeform text.
Important updates follow proposed_actions -> validation -> Save/Edit/Cancel -> server write -> audit log -> timeline event.
Grimoire layer remains practical: mode -> mission -> proof -> reversion.
All real user data is SQL-backed, user-owned, RLS-protected, auditable, and export/delete capable.

python_ml_intelligence_worker.name: Python/ML Intelligence Worker
python_ml_intelligence_worker.core_rule: Python/ML advises. The app validates. The user confirms. The server writes. SQL records. Audit logs.
python_ml_intelligence_worker.write_boundary: Python/ML must never directly mutate SQL.
python_ml_intelligence_worker.write_flow: proposal -> validation -> Save/Edit/Cancel -> server write -> audit log -> timeline event -> dashboard refresh
forbidden_behaviors: Python/ML must never directly mutate SQL.
Python/ML must never bypass Save/Edit/Cancel confirmation.
Python/ML must never silently create memory.
Python/ML must never execute actions directly.
Python/ML must never delete or update user data directly.
Python/ML must never collect hidden personal data.
Python/ML must never make npm build depend on Python.
Python/ML must never provide medical diagnosis, prescription, legal advice, tax advice, or investment advice.
Python/ML must never claim fake accuracy or fake production metrics.

score_definitions.proof_score: Measures real progress quality using completed tasks, proof items, goal movement, concrete outputs, and evidence references.
score_definitions.goal_risk_score: Measures the risk that a goal will slip based on deadlines, missed milestones, low proof, task carryover, and stale progress.
score_definitions.career_readiness_score: Measures readiness for target roles using resume strength, project quality, interview prep, applications, referrals, and skill gaps.
score_definitions.learning_readiness_score: Measures study readiness using weak topics, recent study history, spaced repetition timing, energy, and role relevance.
score_definitions.burnout_risk_score: Measures overload risk using sleep, energy, missed routines, negative drift, proof decline, and task carryover.
score_definitions.project_momentum_score: Measures project health using commits, tests, docs, phase completion, issue closure, and portfolio value.
score_definitions.research_readiness_score: Measures research trajectory using literature review, experiment quality, writing output, paper ideas, and advisor-fit work.

phase_placement.phase_5_15: Python/ML Intelligence Architecture Patch. Source-of-truth only. No active Python runtime.
phase_placement.phase_6: Safe Write / Proposed Action Flow. Builds the write safety gate future ML must use.
phase_placement.phase_7: Carnos Chat + Action Proposal Layer. Adds Carnos proposal contracts compatible with future ML.
phase_placement.phase_8: Real Creation Flows. Creates real user data.
phase_placement.phase_9: Calendar / Timeline / Time Integration. Adds time data needed for priority, overload, and trajectory intelligence.
phase_placement.phase_10: Memory System Foundation. Adds safe memory and retrieval foundation.
phase_placement.phase_11: Python/ML Worker Foundation. Adds apps/worker-python scaffold, contracts, tests, no-write guard, and first simple scorers.
phase_placement.phase_13: Advanced Analytics / World-Class Progress Engine. Activates serious scoring, ranking, simulation, prediction, retrieval, and recommendations.
phase_placement.phase_14: Privacy / Export / Delete / Settings / Hardening. Adds ML privacy controls and output deletion/export.
phase_placement.phase_15: Productionization. Deploys and hardens worker, queues, monitoring, fallbacks, cost controls, and evaluations.

architecture_decisions: Phase 5.15 adds Python/ML as a future separate intelligence worker layer. The worker may score, rank, recommend, retrieve, simulate, summarize, classify, and draft proposed actions, but it must never directly mutate SQL, silently create memory, execute actions, bypass validation, or bypass Save/Edit/Cancel.
non_negotiable_rules: Python/ML must never directly mutate SQL.
Python/ML must never bypass Save/Edit/Cancel confirmation.
Python/ML must never silently create memory.
Python/ML must never execute actions directly.
Python/ML must never delete or update user data directly.
Python/ML must never collect hidden personal data.
Python/ML must never make npm build depend on Python.
Python/ML must never provide medical diagnosis, prescription, legal advice, tax advice, or investment advice.
Python/ML must never claim fake accuracy or fake production metrics.
